positive: A symmetrical and highly detailed botanical celestial map, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora interwoven with abstract constellation pathways. The central composition should showcase large, repeating geometric mandalas integrated with flowing cosmic nebulae patterns. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and brilliant gold foil accents for a luxurious, high-contrast palette. The style should be a blend of Neo-Art Nouveau and cosmic geometry, emphasizing clean silhouettes and intricate linework suitable for screen printing on apparel. Cinematic, ethereal lighting, macro view.
